metadata.title: REST API Foundation with RFC 7807 Error Handling

story.iWant: REST API foundation with standardized error responses
story.soThat: API consumers have consistent, machine-readable error information

tasks.task: Map all framework exceptions (Validation, NotFound, TenantIsolation)
Write integration test for error responses
Verify RFC 7807 format (type, title, status, detail, instance, traceId, tenantId)
Commit: "Add REST API foundation with RFC 7807 error handling"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: framework/web module created with Spring Web MVC dependencies
Error responses include: type, title, status, detail, instance, traceId, tenantId
RestConfiguration.kt with CORS, Jackson ObjectMapper, response formatting
Integration test validates error response format
All framework exceptions mapped to appropriate HTTP status codes

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: RFC 7807 ProblemDetail for error responses. @RestControllerAdvice for global exception handling. Jackson ObjectMapper with ISO-8601 dates. CORS configuration for localhost:3000.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: framework/web module. ProblemDetailExceptionHandler (RFC 7807). Error responses: type, title, status, detail, instance, traceId, tenantId. RestConfiguration. CursorPaginationSupport utility.

module.name: framework/web
module.purpose: REST API foundation - RFC 7807 errors, CORS, Jackson config

dependency.name: spring-boot-starter-web
dependency.usage: Spring Web MVC for REST APIs

dependency.name: jackson-module-kotlin
dependency.usage: Jackson Kotlin support for JSON serialization

constraints.constraint: RFC 7807 ProblemDetail format mandatory for all errors
All error responses must include traceId and tenantId
CORS configured for localhost:3000 (React dev server)

pattern.name: RFC 7807 Exception Handler Pattern

ideas.idea: Integration test: ValidationException → 400 with RFC 7807 format
Integration test: verify type, title, status, detail, instance fields
Integration test: verify traceId and tenantId in response
Test RestConfiguration creates Jackson ObjectMapper bean
